Petition Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850 To Recover Property Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-22-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for Alexandra Elchinoff (Beneficiary). Robert Elliott litigation Counsel for and with Kyle Clark. Paul Mori for and with Kyle Clark (Petitioner).

The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Arlene CSR#2542. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

Petition Pursuant To Probate Code Section 850 To Recover Property Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Continued To Dec-15-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert Elliott and Paul Mori for and with Kyle Clark. Emily Calhoun for and with Alexandra Elchinoff.

The Court stated that they did not have anyone in the position of a Trustee, raised the issue of personal service on Ericka Pfiefer and stated that there was no procedure in the Trust for how to appoint a Successor Trustee. Mr. Elliot stated that Ericka did receive notice, that she represented to him that she had no intention of contesting anything and that he could arrange personal service. Ms. Calhoun stated that the issue is validity of the Trust instrument and that notice would not be required if the Trust was found to be invalid. The matter was continued to December 15, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Anne Paolini Mori for and with Kyle Clarke. Emilie Calhoun for and with Alexandra Elchinoff.

Ms. Calhoun stated that she was in favor of the petition. Ms. Mori stated that she had nothing to add and that there was no objection. The Court granted the petition (signing the order for the same in open court). Bond is fixed in the amount of $670,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-28-2010 Continued To Jun-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
